name: BASELINE_VALIDATION

1.1.name: Run turbulence_qtt_benchmark.py
1.1.result: 4/7 tests passed before timeout (Morton3D, QTT3DCompression, TaylorGreenInviscid, KidaVortex)

1.2.name: Verify ns3d_turbo.py imports
1.2.result: Imports TurboCores, turbo_truncate, turbo_linear_combination_batched from qtt_turbo

1.5.name: Record baseline timing
1.5.result: qtt_turbo ops: 44.90ms @ 32³ rank=64; TurboNS3D diffusion: 285ms @ 16³ rank=32

1.6.name: Record baseline memory
1.6.result: 15.3 MB for ops, 19.2 MB for diffusion solver

1.7.name: Verify physics validation
1.7.result: Diffusion-only: 0.01% energy drift (PASS). Full NS: OOM on 32³
1.7.finding: CRITICAL: Full NS with advection causes OOM on 8GB GPU at 32³

critical_findings: FINDING-001: Full NS with advection causes OOM on 32³ with 8GB GPU
FINDING-002: Truncation (SVD) is 60% of compute cost - confirms rank optimization priority
FINDING-003: ns3d_qtt_native.py has high divergence (1.59) - not divergence-free
FINDING-004: TaylorGreenViscous benchmark takes 1500+ seconds - 200 steps too slow
FINDING-005: Lazy truncation working (1 truncation per step, not per op)
recommendations: PRIORITY-1: Reduce max_rank from 64 to 32-40 to fix OOM and accelerate
PRIORITY-2: Profile memory growth during linear combination (ranks summing)
PRIORITY-3: Consider truncating BEFORE full rank accumulation in advection
PRIORITY-4: Fix ns3d_qtt_native.py divergence issue or deprecate
